findings.description: Header layout is simplified and reorganized in the HTML compared with the PDF.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the top area has the seal/logo on the left, department name beside it, a vertical divider, and leadership names arranged in a separate right-side block. In the HTML, the same content is stacked into a left-aligned single header block without the original two-part horizontal arrangement.

findings.description: Title styling and emphasis differ noticeably in the HTML.
findings.evidence: The PDF emphasizes the date in blue, 'PUBLIC NOTICE' in red, and the main title in larger bold black text. In the HTML, these headings appear in a more uniform dark text style with reduced visual distinction and different weight/color treatment.

findings.description: Logo/graphic placement and scale differ from the PDF.
findings.evidence: The PDF shows a larger state seal and department branding occupying a broader top-left area with adjacent text. In the HTML, the logo is smaller and the branding is condensed into a narrower left-aligned header block.

findings.description: The HTML includes fabricated boilerplate metadata not present in the PDF, including a generic HTML title and imported standalone theme/CSS wrapper text.
findings.evidence: HTML adds '<title>Converted Document</title>' and CSS comments 'Digital Commons NC — Standalone Theme CSS' plus style scaffolding not present as document content in the PDF. The PDF is a public notice and does not display 'Converted Document' or 'Digital Commons NC — Standalone Theme CSS'.

findings.description: Heading hierarchy does not accurately reflect the visual/title structure of the PDF. The main notice title and subtitle are split into h1 and h2, and the h1 combines date and notice label rather than a single document title.
findings.evidence:
PDF visually shows centered lines: 'April 1, 2025', 'PUBLIC NOTICE', then 'Nomination Period for Henderson County Board of Social Services'. HTML encodes '

April 1, 2025
PUBLIC NOTICE

' and '

Nomination Period for
Henderson County
Board of Social Services

'.

findings.description: A substantive text error changes an official’s title in the header: 'Commission' in the PDF became 'Chair' in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF header lists 'DREW T. PLEDGER • Commission'. HTML lists 'DREW T. PLEDGER • Chair'.
